name: Easiest Crock Pot Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin the chicken pieces or use boneless, skinless chicken breasts.
2. Place the chicken in the crockpot.
3. Mix together the soups and pour over the chicken.
4. Cook on low for all day.
5. Remove the chicken from the sauce and take out the bones.
6. Serve over hot rice.
